_meta.lastEditedNotes: Total w/Tax is computed on the page from (price + promoAmount + accessoryAmount) * (1 + taxRate). Edit promoText / accessoryText freely; if the dollar amounts change, also update promoAmount / accessoryAmount so the total recalcs correctly.
